target_skill.name: architect
target_skill.description: Plan before coding — "architect this", "tech spec", "PRD", "how would I build this". Produces SPEC.md/PLAN.md. Not for raw ideas (→ idea-scout), code (→ build), or deploy (→ ship-it).

competing_skills.name: build
competing_skills.description: Write working code — "build this", "prototype this", "MVP this", "make it real". Not for planning (→ architect), bugs (→ systematic-debug), or deploy (→ ship-it).

competing_skills.name: idea-scout
competing_skills.description: Evaluate a raw idea with scoring — "scout this", "what if we built", "is this viable". Auto-fires on new ideas in fresh chats. Not for building (→ architect) or saving without eval (→ idea-vault).

competing_skills.name: brainstorm-engine
competing_skills.description: Generate NEW concepts — "brainstorm", "give me ideas", "what could I build", "rapid fire", "crazy 8s", "reverse brainstorm". Not for evaluating an existing idea (→ idea-scout) or building (→ build).

competing_skills.name: ship-it
competing_skills.description: Set up deployment — "ship it", "deploy this", "host this", "App Store", "Claude Code handoff". Not for fixes to live sites (→ git-ops), prototyping (→ build), or planning (→ architect).

positive_cases: Can you architect the Listing Lens v7 reorg before I start coding?
Write a SPEC.md for the grove-mobile project I sketched last night
How would I build a real-time collab whiteboard for a 3-person team?
PRD for the inventory tracker — primary user is me running a small shop
negative_cases: Build me a tip-splitting HTML calculator with touch-friendly buttons
What if we built a Slack bot that summarizes new Grove tasks every morning?
Set up Vercel hosting for fairbay/inventory-tracker — first deploy
Brainstorm 8 ideas for a kitchen timer app
Prototype the Listing Lens v7 search UI as a React artifact
